title: onobrychis atropatana var. atropatana
intro: Onobrychis atropatana var. atropatana, also known as Mountain clover or Persian clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels and reducing the risk of heart disease. The herbal preparations of Onobrychis atropatana var. atropatana include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as indigestion, diarrhea, and menstrual cramps.
